content: Rust Docker multi-stage: Stage 1 uses rust:1.x-slim or rust:1.x-alpine for build, Stage 2 uses debian:bookworm-slim (~150MB) or alpine:3.x (~25MB). Alpine requires musl target (rustup target add x86_64-unknown-linux-musl). Result: images from 11MB (alpine, pure Rust) to 150MB (debian). Dependency caching: COPY Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock first, build dummy main, then copy src. Reduces rebuild from 5min to 90s.
